formulas.name: Formula for Calculating Length of a Circular Road
formulas.notes: Use this formula to calculate the length of a circular road when the radius is known.

formulas.name: Formula for Calculating Area of a Circular Road
formulas.notes: Use this formula to calculate the area of a circular road when the radius is known.

formulas.name: Formula for Calculating Perimeter of a Rectangle
formulas.notes: Use this formula to calculate the perimeter of a rectangle when the length and breadth are known.

formulas.name: Formula for Calculating Area of a Rectangle
formulas.notes: Use this formula to calculate the area of a rectangle when the length and breadth are known.

formulas.name: Gross Domestic Product (GDP) Formula
formulas.notes: Use this formula to calculate the Gross Domestic Product when the consumer expenditure, investment expenditure, government expenditure, and net export are known.

formulas.name: Net Domestic Product (NDP) Formula
formulas.notes: Use this formula to calculate the Net Domestic Product when the Gross Domestic Product and total depreciation are known.

formulas.name: National Income Formula

variables.GDP (at Factor Cost): Gross Domestic Product at Factor Cost

formulas.notes: Use this formula to calculate the National Income when the Gross Domestic Product at Factor Cost is known.

formulas.name: Infrastructure Index Formula
formulas.notes: Use this formula to calculate the Infrastructure Index when the weightage and value of each sector are known.
